evals.prompt: 帮我把 Geom-GCN 这篇论文从定位到做笔记整条链路跑完。
evals.expected_output: Run resolve, acquisition, and note generation in order.
expectations: The workflow runs resolve first to identify the paper
The workflow runs acquire to download raw assets
The workflow generates a reading note
The raw bundle is stored under ~/papers/{title_slug}
The reading note includes Source URL and Local Raw Path headers

evals.prompt: 这个 OpenReview 链接对应的论文帮我做成研究笔记，如果本地已有 raw 就复用。https://openreview.net/forum?id=SkgBfaNKPr
evals.expected_output: Handle OpenReview-first resolution, reuse existing raw when possible, and produce the note.
expectations: The workflow resolves the OpenReview URL to a paper identity
If local raw exists, it is reused without re-downloading
The workflow produces a reading note
The workflow handles papers that may not have a DOI or final venue

evals.prompt: 我只给标题，你来定位论文、下载 raw、找 repo，然后把阅读笔记写到当前项目的 ./papers 下面。
evals.expected_output: Respect the default project-local note output while keeping canonical raw under ~/papers.
expectations: The workflow resolves the paper from title only
The reading note is written to ./papers/{title_slug}/reading-note.md (not ~/papers)
The note output path follows the re-entry policy
